description_long: This house is a sprawling, single-story structure with a central open courtyard surrounded by multiple rooms and corridors. The exterior walls are predominantly white, accented by red and terracotta roof tiles, and feature a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections. There are several distinct outdoor spaces, including a covered patio with columns and a small garden area with trees and shrubs. The windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with some larger openings facing the courtyard and smaller ones on the exterior walls. The main entryway is marked by a decorative portico with columns and a tiled roof, leading directly into the courtyard. Architectural details suggest a Mediterranean or Spanish Colonial style, with stucco walls, tiled roofs, and ornamental elements.
description: A single-story Mediterranean-style house with a central courtyard, white stucco walls, red-tiled roofs, and a prominent columned entryway. The layout features multiple rooms around the courtyard and several outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entryway with its columned portico, the central courtyard, and the covered patio area on the left side.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear of the house is visible, showing the tiled roof sections and the arrangement of rooms around the courtyard.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the long side of the house, the rear patio, and the overall rectangular footprint with the courtyard in the center.
description_view_3: This view shows the side entry, garden area, and the relationship between the outdoor spaces and the main structure.
attribute_roof_type: flat with partial gable and hip sections
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with courtyard-facing large windows and smaller exterior windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a columned portico with a tiled roof, steps leading up, and decorative elements framing the doorway.
